libraries.name: Uris Library
libraries.description: Classic Cornell study spot with stacks, views, and late-night energy.

libraries.name: Olin Library
libraries.description: Big central library with lots of seating and a reliable study grind feel.

libraries.name: Mann Library
libraries.description: Bright, polished study space with a calmer atmosphere and strong natural light.

libraries.name: Law Library
libraries.description: A quieter, more formal library option for focused work sessions.

buildings.name: Willard Straight Hall
buildings.description: Student-life hub with food, events, lounges, and prime campus location.

buildings.name: Statler Hall
buildings.description: Busy, polished academic building with hotel-school energy and good gathering spaces.

buildings.name: Duffield Hall
buildings.description: Glassy engineering hub with open seating, project energy, and lots of foot traffic.

buildings.name: Goldwin Smith Hall
buildings.description: Arts Quad staple with lecture halls, older architecture, and classic campus feel.
